detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Masterbatedone._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Masterbatedone.sol#643-767):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Masterbatedone.sol#707)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Masterbatedone.sol#781-793)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Masterbatedone.sol#713)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(tfrAmt) (Masterbatedone.sol#803)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.sub(tfrAmt)) (Masterbatedone.sol#805)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Masterbatedone.sol#765)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Masterbatedone.sol#931)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Masterbatedone.sol#911)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Masterbatedone.sol#913)
	Masterbatedone._rOwned (Masterbatedone.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Masterbatedone._takeTeam(uint256) (Masterbatedone.sol#925-933)
	- Masterbatedone._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Masterbatedone.sol#885-921)
	- Masterbatedone.balanceOf(address) (Masterbatedone.sol#469-473)
	- Masterbatedone.constructor() (Masterbatedone.sol#403-433)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Masterbatedone.sol#765)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Masterbatedone.sol#939)
	Masterbatedone._rTotal (Masterbatedone.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Masterbatedone._getCurrentSupply() (Masterbatedone.sol#1081-1091)
	- Masterbatedone._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Masterbatedone.sol#937-943)
	- Masterbatedone.constructor() (Masterbatedone.sol#403-433)
	- Masterbatedone.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Masterbatedone.sol#565-587)

	- [Masterbatedone._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Masterbatedone.sol#L885-L921)
